headline: Amazon Readies $25 Billion Bond With AI Costs Rising
summary: Amazon is reportedly readying a bond offering of at least $25 billion, as the tech giant continues to plow investments into AI-related infrastructure.  Amazon stock was trading slightly lower.  The Seattle-based Amazon is expected to issue at least $25 billion of new U.S.-dollar bonds Tuesday, the Wall Street Journal reported.
